title: Tanzu Service Mesh Global Namespace
description: A Tanzu Service Mesh global namespace that connects workloads across multiple Kubernetes clusters and clouds into a single virtual network.

description.description: Description of the global namespace purpose.

domain_name.description: DNS domain used for inter-service communication within the namespace.

use_shared_gateway.description: Whether to use a shared ingress gateway.

mtls_enforced.description: Whether mutual TLS is enforced for all inter-service communication.

cluster_configs.description: Clusters and namespaces participating in this global namespace.

ClusterConfig.description: A cluster participating in a global namespace.

namespaces.description: Kubernetes namespaces from this cluster included in the global namespace.
